mapper.select: select paper_id, user_serial, title, paper_url, read_date, learning_note from papers where user_serial = #{userSerial}
select paper_id, user_serial, title, paper_url, read_date, learning_note from papers where paper_id = #{paperId}

select p1.paper_id AS citing_paper_id, p1.title AS citing_paper_title, p2.paper_id AS cited_paper_id, p2.title AS cited_paper_title from papers p1 inner join paper_citations pc on p1.paper_id = pc.citing_paper_id inner join papers p2 on pc.cited_paper_id = p2.paper_id where citing_paper_id = #{paperId}

select p1.paper_id AS cited_paper_id, p1.title AS cited_paper_title, p2.paper_id AS citing_paper_id, p2.title AS citing_paper_title from papers p1 inner join paper_citations pc on p1.paper_id = pc.cited_paper_id inner join papers p2 on pc.citing_paper_id = p2.paper_id where cited_paper_id = #{paperId}
